\section*{BIO Branch Successor Pilot}

\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{BIO Branch Successor Pilot}



This generated packet is an L2 branch-pilot shell for the Biology branch. It is not a supersession of the canonical BIO Branch Book. The pilot preserves the nondegenerate C\textsubscript{Bio}\textsuperscript{nd} endpoint scope without claiming evolutionary closure or full-class biology certification. The no-smuggling boundary is maintained: all structure derives from role carriers and source descendants; no biological primitives are imported as assumptions.



\subsection*{Pilot posture and boundary conditions}

Computed BIO posture: \textbf{conditional-cert-close}. The endpoint is scoped to the nondegenerate certified biological class $\mathcal{{C}}_{{\mathrm{{Bio}}}}^{{\mathrm{{nd}}}}$. The boundary obligation \texttt{{ob:BIO.BND-open}} (BND for the full replicator class) remains active and is intentionally preserved in this pilot. Evolutionary dynamics (ob:BIO.EVO) and multicellular organization (ob:BIO.MULTI) are downstream of the endpoint and are not claimed here.



\subsection*{No-smuggling invariant}

The following primitives are \emph{not} imported in this pilot: genes, cells, fitness functions, thermodynamic entropy, membrane biophysics, Lipschitz geometry, or any biological vocabulary not derivable from role carriers and NFC source-descendant structure.
